effective_from: unreleased activation update after v3.2.8 rollback
note: NbeV1.1 high-confidence CDS-derived codon reference is the current production default for N. benthamiana software paths. This is a provenance-tracked in-silico default, not wet-lab validation, expression/yield prediction, or a biological-superiority claim. The legacy Kazusa/SGN composite remains packaged as a historical comparator. Keep this file synchronized with engines/profile/utils.py _HOST_CODON_TABLE_OVERRIDES, scoring/feasibility GC defaults, registry/current_parameter_registry.yaml, API metadata, UI copy, docs, and manuscript wording.

legacy_comparator.status: historical comparator retained for v3.2.x continuity and sensitivity interpretation
